untranslatable_reason: This signal describes an options strategy (call bull spread with specific strike price relationships and simultaneous multi-leg execution). The backtest engine indicators provided are designed for price action and technical analysis on single instruments, not options Greeks, implied volatility, strike prices, or synchronized multi-leg options trades. The core logic—buying lower strike calls and selling higher strike calls simultaneously—cannot be expressed using the available price, moving average, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, or volume indicators.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_77 is an options-specific strategy requiring options market data (strike prices, option chains, Greeks) and execution logic for multi-leg spreads. This backtest engine is designed for single-instrument price-based trading rules only.
